title: OANDA Refdata Config
description: Venue-specific configuration for the OANDA refdata loader.

environment.description: OANDA environment to query for instrument metadata.

account_id.description: OANDA account identifier used when requesting instrument metadata.

api_base_url.description: Optional override for the OANDA REST API base URL. If omitted, the loader derives the default from environment.

secret_ref.description: Pilot/Vault logical reference for the OANDA API bearer token.
